series_metadata.series_description: Records include correspondence regarding Monthly shift schedules reflecting work hours and work days of officers who work shift assignments; required by the collective bargaining agreement to be prepared and posted each month. Daily report of officer’s activities during their scheduled shift. (e.g., Overtime Rosters) (Most documents are originals; some are copies).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office or audited and report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. Records Center storage ( 3 years) and
